title: DORA Art.10 — Cisco ISE Multi-Site Replication Resilience Evidence

compliance.assurance_rationale: DORA Art.10 — ICT business continuity. UC-17.1.61 evidences multi-site ISE replication health and WAN-link impact.
compliance.controlObjective: Demonstrate that ISE multi-site replication is operating within RPO targets and that WAN-link instability impacts on replication are captured.
compliance.evidenceArtifact: Saved search 'UC-22.3.47' archiving cross-site replication health to `audit_evidence` with `dora_clause=Art.10`.

app: Splunk Enterprise Security (263) + Splunk Add-on for Cisco Identity Services (1915).
spl:
index=nac sourcetype="cisco:ise:syslog" MessageCode IN (37001, 37002, 37008) earliest=-1d
| stats count, max(replication_lag_seconds) as max_lag by site_pair, MessageCode
| eval dora_clause="Art.10", control="Multi_Site_BCDR"
| collect index=audit_evidence
description: We continuously evidence DORA Art.10 — multi-site ISE replication resilience.
value: DORA Art.10 requires evidence of business continuity. Multi-site ISE replication is foundational for NAC continuity; this UC produces evidence.
implementation: Schedule the saved search daily at 06:00 local time; archive results to the `audit_evidence` summary index for DORA quarterly review.
visualization: DORA Art.10 panel: replication lag; WAN impact correlation.

references.title: UC-17.1.61 — ISE Cross-Site Replication Lag and WAN Loss Impact

knownFalsePositives: 1. Brief WAN flap during scheduled maintenance.
detailedImplementation:
## Prerequisites

- UC-17.1.61 operational.

## Step 1-5

```ini
[UC-22.3.47: DORA Art.10 — Multi-Site Replication]
cron_schedule = 0 6 * * *
actions = summary_index
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.3.47,reg=DORA,clause=Art.10
```
grandmaExplanation: We continuously evidence DORA Art.10 — multi-site ISE replication resilience. That is important for the audit, where proof needs to line up with what the rules expect.

controlTest.positiveScenario: WAN flap impacts replication. Evidence captured.
controlTest.negativeScenario: Healthy replication. Empty result; control attested.

evidence: Saved search archived to `audit_evidence` with DORA Art.10 tagging.
